_comment: DISABLED AUTONOMOUS SHADOW EVALUATOR WORKFLOW — HMZ Instantly Responder Automation. This workflow is INACTIVE and must NOT be imported to production without explicit owner approval. It has no connection to Sender, no Instantly API calls, and no production DataTable writes. Manual test trigger only. See docs/AUTONOMOUS_SHADOW_EVALUATOR_WORKFLOW_SPEC.md.
name: HMZ Autonomous Shadow Evaluator [DISABLED — DO NOT ACTIVATE WITHOUT OWNER APPROVAL]

nodes.name: Manual Test Webhook [INACTIVE]
nodes.notes: SHADOW EVALUATOR ONLY. This webhook is inactive. Manual test payloads only. No production traffic.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $input.first().json;
const r = p.eligibility_result;
return [{ json: {
  _warning: 'SHADOW_EVALUATOR_WORKFLOW — NO PRODUCTION TRAFFIC — DISABLED — would_send_live_now is always false',
  case_id: p.case_id,
  thread_id: p.thread_id,
  campaign_id: p.campaign_id,
  sender_email: p.sender_email,
  incoming_text_excerpt: (p.incoming_text || '').substring(0, 200),
  detected_broad_category: p.broad_category,
  detected_micro_intent: p.micro_intent,
  additional_intents: p.additional_intents || [],
  confidence: p.confidence,
  would_be_shadow_eligible: r.would_be_shadow_eligible,
  would_send_live_now: false,  // HARDCODED FALSE — SHADOW EVALUATOR ONLY
  blocked_reason: r.blocked_reason,
  recommended_action: r.recommended_action,
  autonomous_mode_state: 'DISABLED',
  dry_run_state: true,
  shadow_only_state: true,
  shadow_evaluator_mode: true,
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  post_action_review_required: true
}}];
